storage_methods.name: 远程URL下载
storage_methods.description: 从远程服务器下载shellcode，支持分段加载

storage_methods.name: Word List Encoding
storage_methods.description: Encode shellcode as English words/wordlist for low entropy evasion

storage_methods.name: MAC Address Encoding
storage_methods.description: Encode shellcode as MAC address format strings (XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX)

storage_methods.name: RSA Encrypted
storage_methods.description: RSA encryption for shellcode, uses public key cryptography for payload protection

storage_methods.name: Resource Encrypted
storage_methods.description: Store encrypted shellcode in PE resource section (RT_RCDATA), decrypt at runtime

storage_methods.name: Huffman Encoded
storage_methods.description: 使用Huffman编码压缩存储shellcode，减小体积并增加混淆

memory_allocators.name: VirtualAlloc
HeapCreate
memory_allocators.description: 在堆上分配可执行内存

memory_allocators.name: NtAllocateVirtualMemory
内存映射文件
memory_allocators.description: 通过文件映射申请内存

memory_allocators.name: VirtualAllocEx
memory_allocators.description: 在目标进程中分配内存(注入)

memory_allocators.name: NtMapViewOfSection
memory_allocators.description: 使用Section对象映射内存，跨进程共享内存

memory_allocators.name: Section Mapping
memory_allocators.description: Use NtCreateSection and NtMapViewOfSection to allocate executable memory via section objects

memory_allocators.name: VirtualAlloc
memory_allocators.description: Standard Windows API for allocating executable memory. Allocates RWX memory pages for shellcode storage.

memory_allocators.name: NtAllocateVirtualMemory
memory_allocators.description: Native NT API for memory allocation. Direct syscall bypasses userland hooks.

memory_allocators.name: HeapAlloc
memory_allocators.description: Heap-based memory allocation using process heap. Alternative to VirtualAlloc for shellcode storage.

memory_allocators.name: LargePageAllocation
memory_allocators.description: Allocate memory using large pages (2MB+). Can bypass some memory scanners due to different page attributes.

memory_allocators.name: DripLoader Delayed Allocation
memory_allocators.description: 延迟内存分配和提交，逐页注入shellcode，模拟正常内存行为以绕过事件检测

memory_allocators.name: Indirect Syscall Allocator
memory_allocators.description: 使用间接系统调用分配内存，避免用户态Hook

memory_allocators.name: Mockingjay Allocator
memory_allocators.description: 利用具有RWX权限的系统DLL进行分配，无需调用VirtualAlloc

data_copiers.name: 循环字节复制
data_copiers.description: 逐字节复制，可用于解密同时复制

data_copiers.name: NtWriteVirtualMemory
data_copiers.code_template:
SIZE_T bytesWritten;
NtWriteVirtualMemory(hProcess, dest, src, size, &bytesWritten);

data_copiers.name: RtlCopyMemory
data_copiers.description: Windows kernel-mode compatible memory copy function

data_copiers.name: RtlCopyMemory
data_copiers.description: Native NT API for memory copy operations. Equivalent to memcpy but uses NT API.

data_copiers.name: NtWriteVirtualMemory
data_copiers.description: Native NT API for writing to memory. Can write to local or remote process memory.

data_copiers.name: WriteProcessMemory
data_copiers.description: Standard Windows API for writing to process memory.

data_copiers.name: Indirect Syscall Copier
data_copiers.description: 使用间接系统调用写入内存，避免用户态Hook

executors.name: 函数指针
executors.description: 直接转换为函数指针调用

executors.name: CreateThread
executors.description: 创建新线程执行
executors.code_template:
HANDLE hThread = CreateThread(NULL, 0, (LPTHREAD_START_ROUTINE)addr, NULL, 0, NULL);
WaitForSingleObject(hThread, INFINITE);

executors.description: 通过Fiber切换执行

executors.name: CreateRemoteThread
executors.description: 在目标进程中创建远程线程
executors.code_template:
HANDLE hProcess = OpenProcess(PROCESS_ALL_ACCESS, FALSE, pid);
HANDLE hThread = CreateRemoteThread(hProcess, NULL, 0, (LPTHREAD_START_ROUTINE)addr, NULL, 0, NULL);

executors.name: SetThreadContext
executors.description: 修改线程上下文执行(进程镂空)

executors.description: 通过EnumDesktopsW回调执行

executors.name: 线程劫持

executors.description: 使用NTDLL底层API创建线程

executors.description: 通过线程池等待对象的回调执行shellcode

executors.description: 通过定时器队列定时器回调执行shellcode

executors.description: 通过显示器枚举回调执行shellcode

executors.description: 通过字体族枚举回调执行shellcode

executors.name: FlsAlloc回调
executors.description: 通过Fiber本地存储分配回调执行shellcode

executors.name: EtwpCreateEtwThread Execution
executors.description: Execute shellcode via ETW (Event Tracing for Windows) thread creation callback

executors.name: RtlCreateUserThread Execution
executors.description: Execute shellcode via RtlCreateUserThread native API, creating thread in target process without CreateRemoteThread

executors.name: LdrEnumerateLoadedModules Callback
executors.description: Execute shellcode via LdrEnumerateLoadedModules native API callback

executors.name: InitOnceExecuteOnce Callback
executors.description: Execute shellcode via one-time initialization callback mechanism

executors.name: CreateThread
executors.description: Standard Windows API to create a new thread for shellcode execution. Basic execution method.

executors.name: CreateRemoteThread
executors.description: Create thread in remote process for process injection. Classic cross-process execution technique.

executors.name: EarlyBird_APC
executors.description: Queue APC to suspended process thread. Inject into process before it starts. Also known as process hollowing variant.

executors.name: Fibers
executors.description: Convert thread to fiber and execute shellcode via fiber switching. Alternative execution path avoiding CreateThread.

executors.name: NtQueueApcThreadEx_Local
executors.description: Local APC queue execution using NtQueueApcThreadEx syscall. Execute in current process without CreateThread.

executors.name: EtwpCreateEtwThread
executors.description: Undocumented NT API for creating ETW threads. Alternative thread creation method.

executors.name: NtCreateThreadEx
executors.description: Native NT API for thread creation. Direct syscall for thread creation bypassing userland hooks.

executors.name: EnumSystemLocales_Callback
executors.description: Callback-based execution using EnumSystemLocalesEx. Shellcode executed as callback function.

executors.name: SetTimer_Callback
executors.description: Callback-based execution using Windows Timer. Shellcode executed via timer callback.

executors.name: ModuleStomping
executors.description: Overwrite entry point of legitimate DLL in remote process. Execute shellcode from existing module context.

executors.name: RtlCreateUserThread
executors.description: Native NT API wrapper for creating user mode threads. Alternative to CreateRemoteThread.

executors.name: EnumChildWindows Callback
executors.description: 通过EnumChildWindows回调函数执行shellcode，避免CreateThread调用

executors.name: EnumDateFormats Callback
executors.description: 通过EnumDateFormats回调函数执行shellcode

executors.name: EnumDesktopWindows Callback
executors.description: 通过EnumDesktopWindows回调函数执行shellcode

executors.name: EnumSystemLocales Callback
executors.description: 通过EnumSystemLocales回调函数执行shellcode

executors.name: Indirect Syscall Executor
executors.description: 通过间接系统调用创建线程执行shellcode，跳转到NTDLL中的syscall指令

executors.name: Fiber Executor
executors.description: 通过Windows Fiber机制执行shellcode，创建协程上下文

executors.name: Module Stomping Executor
executors.description: 覆盖合法DLL模块的.text段来执行shellcode，无需创建新线程

executors.name: VEH Exception Handler
executors.description: 通过向量化异常处理器执行shellcode，触发异常后捕获执行
